subcodes.title: Fi Bayani Lawhi’l-Mahfuz (Letter on the Preserved Tablet) (part II)
subcodes.first_line: The questioner hath assuredly asked thee about al-lawḥ al-maḥfūẓ ("The Preserved Tablet"). Inform him then according to what God, the All-Encompassing, hath taught thee [the Bāb]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. و قد سئلک السائل عن اللوح الحفیظ اعلمه بما قد علمک الله المحیط و ها انا ذا القیت الیک من رشحات تلک الالواح المستضیئه
subcodes.subjects: @seven stages of creation, @the cross and the trinity, @law of cause and effect, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell
